title: Mybench Ledger Row
description: One row of the hash-chained append-only local ledger (asset A3). Metadata ONLY: additionalProperties:false makes content, prompt-text, and filename fields structurally impossible (privacy invariant #1). Version 1 replaces the pre-ADR-0002 version 0 stub; any widening of this schema is an ADR-level decision.

schema_version.description: Row schema version; bump on breaking changes.

type.description: Row type. genesis appears exactly once, at i=0; binding rows record commit↔activity bindings (MYB-3.5).

ts.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp of the append.

prev.description: h of the previous row; 64 zeros for the genesis row.

h.description: SHA-256('mybench:v1:ledgerrow' || canonical JSON of this row without h), lowercase hex.

session_id.description: Opaque session id (source UUID); never path- or content-derived (ADR-0002 §4).

session_root.description: Finalized session Merkle root per ADR-0002 §3, lowercase hex.

item_count.description: Number of committed items in the session tree.

source.description: Capture adapter that produced the items.

commit_hash.description: Bound commit id (SHA-1 or SHA-256 repo), lowercase hex. Never the message, diff, filenames, or branch — those are leak channels and have no fields.

commit_ts.description: Committer timestamp normalized to UTC RFC 3339.

repo_id.description: Opaque keyed-HMAC repo identity (never a name, URL, or path) — OQ #9 / ADR-0002 §4 amendment pattern.

session_ref.description: Optional abstract linkage to a session root (64 hex); semantics unpinned in v0 (MYB-3.5 notes).
